Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's time to go to school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's nothing good on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An irritatingly catchy song[n]comes from the speakers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_VER0131
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An irritatingly catchy song[n]comes from the speakers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Four Salvation Badges—one for every member of the household! You can't be safe without 'em![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}We'll also provide a set of four Disaster-Proof Backpacks! Now, how much would you pay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12080 0 0}You may be surprised to learn that it's only 29,800 yen! Await the apocalypse in style![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh... What's this? I'm hearing the cries of the people! I'm hearing the phones ringing off the hook![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're already completely sold out! 100%! Sorry folks, but when it's gone, it's gone![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12018 0 0}We'll see you next Sunday, same time, same channel![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The shopping program is over...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A casual melody is playing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Even though it's Monday, the[n]programming seems to have been[n]rescheduled for summer vacation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12097 0 0}Hello, everyone! Welcome to the home shopping show, Tanaka's Amazing Commodities![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm your host, Tanaka, with a live presentation of my Amazing Commodities![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}We'll show you great products at unbeatable prices! So don't touch that dial, because you won't want to miss these![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh my goodness! It's wonderful![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}All of this for just {f 2 4 3} yen![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I buy the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}[n]set for {f 2 4 3} yen...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I bought the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}[n]set for {f 2 4 3} yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't have enough money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a jelly-tasting set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a home alone security set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a beginner's home cooking set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a healthy lifestyle set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a designer brand set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a Father's Day campaign! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a dieting set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a home gardening set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing an office snack set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing an outdoor activity set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a seasonal corn set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing part two of the designer brand set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing an assorted summer drinks set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a spooky season set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing part two of the home gardening set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a sutra set to ward off evil spirits! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be having a sale on luxury brands! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a foolproof disaster prevention set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a juicy seasonal gift set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a colorful and exciting toy set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a set of assorted instant food! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a Halloween fun set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a samurai training set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a mystery doll set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a bodybuilding supplement set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing an enticing jewelry set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a Become-a-Spy set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a luxury fruit basket set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing an exam study set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a warm and toasty winter set! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}Next time, we'll be introducing a New Year's gemstone campaign! Don't miss it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12032 0 0}That's it for this year's special deliveries! See you next year~![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's it for today! We're allll sold out! Sorry, folks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12018 0 0}We'll see you next Sunday, same time, same channel![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The shopping program is over...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is a special limited product, available today only! You heard right—TODAY ONLY![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the Mother's Day gift set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Want to show your mother how much you appreciate her, but need some help? Then this is just for you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! It's the perfect gift![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the jelly-tasting set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}For those who love the delicacy of a good jelly snack, this set is just for you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And, you get two of them! Your life won't be nearly as sweet without this jelly![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the home alone security set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Living by yourself? Feeling insecure in these treacherous times? Fear not![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And, you get three of them! With these, your house will be an impenetrable fortress![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the beginner's home cooking set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Have you been dreaming about learning to cook, but don't know where to start? Well, look no further![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Put this on and it'll turn you into a first-class chef![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the healthy lifestyle set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Want to show off how much healthier you are than everyone else around you? Then, do we have just the thing for you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Stay healthy from your head to your toes wearing these![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the designer brand set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you're concerned about your personal appearance, this is something you must have on you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! This luxurious fragrance will change your life![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the Father's Day gift campaign![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}What better way to show your father how much you appreciate him than a heartfelt gift?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Your father won't be able to contain himself when he sees this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the diet support set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hate exercising? Don't want to change your diet? Looking for an easy way to lose weight? Then do we have good news for you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Just slip into this and the hourglass body you dream of will be all yours![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the home gardening set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Perfect for those of you who've been dreaming of growing a lush garden at home! It's great for beginners, too![n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And, you get two! These little gems will grow into the sweetest onions you've ever tasted![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... a tasty office snacks set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Take a much-needed break from your hectic work life![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And, you get THREE of them! Our employees eat this all the time too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the outdoor activity set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Summer vacation is upon us! We have just the thing for you this hot summer![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Stay stable on any terrain![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the sweet seasonal corn set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}You gotta have corn for summer! Sweet, sweet corn![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And, you get three of them! This is one item I highly recommend![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... part two of the designer brand set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}It was so popular the first time around that we brought it back, better than ever![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Not only is it stylish, it makes the perfect gift![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the assorted summer drinks set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is the heat driving you to your wits' end? Cool off with these refreshing drinks![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And, you get TEN of them! So cool, so refreshing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the spooky season set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Summer calls for a test of courage! Prepare yourself with this set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And, you get three of them! Did you just feel a chill run down your spine?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... part two of the home gardening set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Back by popular demand! We have more seedlings to introduce this time![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And, you get two of them! We recommend making boiled spinach when they've grown![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... this sutra set to ward off evil spirits![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Have you felt a chill down your spine? Do you feel like something's been following you?[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And, you get three of them! Chant this sutra to dispel evil spirits clinging on to you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the luxury brand set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you've always dreamed of showing off your very own luxury goods, now's the chance![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! With this, you'll fit right in with the celebrities![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the foolproof disaster prevention set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}In this unpredictable world where anything can happen at any time, prepare for the worst with these items![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! With this, you'll never have to worry about a thing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... this! A juicy seasonal gift set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Pears are in season right now... But don't you think they're pretty hard to peel?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}But with the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}, the pear's skin will come right off![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... this exciting toy set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's not just a great gift for children, but also for adults who yearn to feel young again![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Just try to resist the urge to move it around! Bet you can't![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... an assortment of instant food![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Too busy to whip up a full meal? Or maybe you've got a hankering for something quick and easy?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}Then how about some {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}? And five of 'em, to boot! A must-have pantry item![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... a festive Halloween set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Halloween is just around the corner! For those of you who want a head start...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have this adorable {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Become the cutest pumpkin around town![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the Become-a-Samurai set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now listen up, all you die-hard fans of the Sengoku era! Put this on and feel just like a noble samurai![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 0 1 38}Myohou Muramasa{f 0 1 27}! It's so well made, who'd believe it's a replica!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... a mystery doll set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Calling all doll collectors! We've got a great selection of dolls just for you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And it comes in a bundle of three! Look at this fine craftsmanship![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the bodybuilder's support set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Started working out but struggling to keep at it? On the verge of giving up? Then this is just the thing for you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Anyone can look as built as a brick house wearing this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... an enticing jewelry set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you love yourself some gorgeous gemstones, then you're in for a treat![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have this lovely {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And they come as a set of three! Hurry and get them before they sell out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the Become-a-Spy set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Make your dreams come true, and become the hero in every spy movie![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! With these specially crafted shoes, you won't make a sound sneaking around![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... a luxury fruit basket set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}You know those expensive fruits you normally can't afford? Well, do we have a good deal for you today![n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! And they come in a bundle of three! These fine apples can't be found at any ol' market![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the exam support set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}The end of the year is fast approaching, and exam season is here! With this set, test-taking will be a breeze![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Just wrap this around your head and you'll pass with flying colors![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the warm and toasty winter set![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}With the temperatures dropping drastically this month, a nasty cold is the last thing you want to catch![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Put this on, and you'll survive even the North Pole![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_087_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12086 0 0}Today we're introducinggg... the New Year's gemstone campaign![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is our last deal of the year, and it's a total steal! We've got loads of gemstones carefully curated for you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}First up, we have this lovely {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! Two of these fiery red gemstones, actually, just for you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I buy the {f 0 1 39}Myohou Muramasa{f 0 1 27}[n]set for {f 2 4 3} yen...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I bought the {f 0 1 39}Myohou Muramasa{f 0 1 27}[n]set for {f 2 4 3} yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_CLOSET_0406
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let's not turn on the TV. It might disturb[n]the neighbors this late at night...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I better put my stuff away[n]in the closet for now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GO_TO_BED_0406
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm tired... I'll watch TV another day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't feel so good...[n]I should head to bed early...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}These items were a big hit last week, so we're going to be selling them again this week![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_198_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the news... The missing people that[n]were found developed Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_187_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The news is talking about a[n]"cult gathering" set to happen[n]around the start of the year...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_100_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Your health is our top priority![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_101_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}A mysterious card with mystical powers![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_102_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}This'll make you much stronger![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Provides excellent protection![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}The perfect gift to capture a woman's heart![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Functional and fashionable![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}A large quantity of valuable gemstones![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_107_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Guaranteed to make your friends jealous![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The news is on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_109_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And now, for our special feature.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We'll be taking a look at a new disease emerging in our fast-paced society.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The sickness, known as "Apathy Syndrome," is especially high in frequency among students and office workers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The condition tends to strike without warning, late at night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The victims are unable to make it to schools and offices, worrying their families.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_110_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The report continues...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_111_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The news is on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_112_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Our next story is on a topic running close to home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The monorail is a familiar sight, and nearly everyone on the island rides it sometimes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But lately, the system has been plagued by mysterious troubles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The train cars were past the system's terminus, causing a string of headaches for the authorities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_113_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The report continues...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_115_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to watch TV.[n]{f 1 1}
